steps.title: Set up the linear equation
steps.content:
The librarian starts with 43 books. If each of $c$ children gets 2 books and 7 books are left over, the total is accounted for as:
$$43 = 2c + 7$$

steps.title: Solve for the number of children
steps.content:
Subtract 7 from both sides:
$$43 - 7 = 2c$$
$$36 = 2c$$
Divide both sides by 2:
$$c = 18$$
B is correct.
